title: Omit class name when unchanged by transform
description: When transforming a class, the class name should be omitted if it remains unchanged. This improves code clarity and avoids unnecessary repetition, making transformations easier to read and maintain.
recommendation: Omit the class name in transformation code when it does not change as part of the transformation.

noncompliant: transformClass(MyClass.class, ...); // MyClass is unchanged but still specified
compliant: transformClass(...); // Class name omitted since it is unchanged

checks.message: Omit the class name in transformation code when it does not change as part of the transformation.
